metadata.description: The person appears to be a female in her 30s, with olive skin tone and a scattering of small freckles across her nose and cheeks. Her face is an oval shape with a softly defined jawline. She has long, dark brown hair with subtle lighter highlights and some visible gray strands at the roots, styled in loose waves that frame her face and fall over her shoulders. Her eyes are dark brown, almond-shaped, and set slightly wide apart, with a few fine lines visible at the outer corners. Her eyebrows are medium-thick and naturally arched. Her nose has a straight bridge and a slightly rounded tip. Her lips are medium-full with a well-defined cupid's bow. She has a warm, closed-mouth smile, and her head is angled slightly to her right.
metadata.anchor: Oval face with warm, closed-mouth smile
